swahili.solve_5_math_challenges_correctly: Tatua changamoto 5 za hesabu kwa usahihi
swahili.land_a_heavy_or_super_aircraft: Tua ndege ya Heavy au Super
swahili.guide_aircraft_safely_solve_rate_probl: Ongoza ndege kwa usalama. Tatua matatizo ya kasi. Bobea hesabu za usafiri wa anga.
swahili.light_traffic_generous_spacing_good_fo: Msongamano mdogo, nafasi pana — vizuri kwa wadhibiti wapya.
swahili.manageable_load_focus_on_technique_wit: Mzigo unaoweza kudhibitiwa — zingatia mbinu bila shinikizo la wakati.
swahili.realistic_airport_sequencing_required_: Uwanja halisi — upangaji unahitajika, migongano inawezekana.
swahili.high_load_expect_missed_approaches_fue: Mzigo mkubwa — tarajia kukosa kutua, shinikizo la mafuta.
swahili.ops_control_inquiry_widget: 🎚️ Udhibiti wa operesheni — Wijeti ya uchunguzi
swahili.move_five_operational_sliders_predict_: Sogeza vitelezi vitano vya operesheni. Tabiri jinsi kila kimoja kinavyoingiliana kabla ya kuanza kipindi. Hakuna alama, hakuna ufunuo — wewe mwenyewe unatathmini uelewa wako.
swahili.your_hypothesis_what_combo_do_you_expe: Dhana yako (ni mchanganyiko gani unaotarajia utaanguka operesheni kwanza?)
swahili.e_g_low_separation_high_spawn_rate_com: mfano, mtengano mdogo + kiwango cha juu cha kutokea hujikusanya kabla upepo haujawa muhimu...
swahili.which_two_sliders_are_most_coupled_do_: Ni vitelezi vipi viwili vilivyounganishwa zaidi — unatabiri mzigo wa kuongeza au wa kuzidisha?
swahili.where_on_each_axis_does_the_trainable_: Ni wapi kwenye kila mhimili eneo la "linaloweza kufunzwa" linaishia na "lenye mkazo" linaanzia?
swahili.if_wind_goes_to_30kt_what_minimum_sepa: Ikiwa upepo unafika 30kt, ni mtengano gani wa chini unaoweka mzigo kuwa thabiti?
swahili.could_a_faster_decision_timeout_compen: Je, muda wa uamuzi wa haraka unaweza kufidia mtengano finyu, au unafanya mambo kuwa mabaya zaidi?
swahili.i_can_explain_in_my_own_words_why_this: Naweza kueleza —kwa maneno yangu mwenyewe— kwa nini mchanganyiko huu wa vitelezi unatoa mzigo huu.
swahili.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Wijeti ya uchunguzi — hakuna alama, hakuna ufunuo, hakuna kutoa majibu. Jenga nadharia yako mwenyewe.
swahili.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: kwa kutumia maneno rahisi ya kila siku na sentensi fupi
swahili.for_a_5th_grade_student_brief_and_frie: kwa mwanafunzi wa darasa la 5, kwa ufupi na kirafiki
swahili.for_a_high_school_student_studying_pre: kwa mwanafunzi wa sekondari anayesoma kabla ya kalkulasi au fizikia
swahili.click_explain_for_a_plain_language_bre: Bofya "Eleza" kwa maelezo ya lugha rahisi ya dhana hii ya ATC.
swahili.air_traffic_control_radar_display_use_: Onyesho la rada ya udhibiti wa trafiki ya anga. Tumia Tab kubadilisha ndege, H kwa mwelekeo, R kwa njia ya kurukia, C kuruhusu kukaribia, Space kusitisha, I kwa muhtasari wa hali.
swahili.toggle_fullscreen_for_the_atc_radar: Geuza skrini nzima kwa rada ya ATC

hausa.land_10_aircraft_in_one_session: Saukar da jiragu 10 a zama daya
hausa.land_25_aircraft_in_one_session: Saukar da jiragu 25 a zama daya
hausa.land_10_aircraft_with_zero_conflicts: Saukar da jiragu 10+ ba tare da karo ba
hausa.land_a_heavy_or_super_aircraft: Saukar da jirgin Heavy ko Super
hausa.maintain_90_efficiency_with_10_landing: Ci gaba da ingancin 90%+ tare da saukar 10+
hausa.guide_aircraft_safely_solve_rate_probl: Jagoranci jiragen sama cikin aminci. Warware matsalolin gudu. Kware a lissafin tafiyar sama.
hausa.light_traffic_generous_spacing_good_fo: Karancin zirga-zirga, faffadan tazara — yana da kyau ga sabbin masu sarrafawa.
hausa.manageable_load_focus_on_technique_wit: Nauyin da za a iya sarrafawa — mai da hankali kan dabara ba tare da matsin lokaci ba.
hausa.realistic_airport_sequencing_required_: Filin jirgin sama na gaske — ana bukatar tsari, karo na yiwuwa.
hausa.high_load_expect_missed_approaches_fue: Nauyi mai yawa — sa ran rasa kusantowa, matsin man fetur.
hausa.saturated_staffing_runway_capacity_exc: An cika — an wuce karfin ma'aikata/hanyoyin tashi.
hausa.move_five_operational_sliders_predict_: Matsar da silaidodi biyar na aiki. Yi hasashen yadda kowanne ke hulda kafin fara zama. Babu maki, babu bayyanawa — kai da kanka kake tantance fahimtarka.
hausa.your_hypothesis_what_combo_do_you_expe: Hasashenka (wane hadi kake tsammanin zai fara rusa ayyuka?)
hausa.e_g_low_separation_high_spawn_rate_com: misali, karamin rabuwa + yawan bayyana mai yawa yana tarawa kafin iska ta zama mahimmanci...
hausa.which_two_sliders_are_most_coupled_do_: Wadanne silaidodi biyu ne suka fi hadewa — kana hasashen nauyin hadawa ko ninkawa?
hausa.where_on_each_axis_does_the_trainable_: A ina kan kowane axis yankin "horarwa" ke karewa kuma "mai damuwa" ke farawa?
hausa.if_wind_goes_to_30kt_what_minimum_sepa: Idan iska ta kai 30kt, wane mafi karancin rabuwa ne ke ci gaba da nauyin?
hausa.could_a_faster_decision_timeout_compen: Shin saurin karewar lokacin yanke shawara zai iya rama matsattsen rabuwa, ko yana kara muni?
hausa.i_can_explain_in_my_own_words_why_this: Zan iya bayyana —cikin kalmomina— dalilin da yasa wannan hadin silaidodi ke bayar da wannan nauyin.
hausa.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Kayan bincike — babu maki, babu bayyanawa, babu zuba amsa. Gina ka'idarka.
hausa.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: ta amfani da kalmomin yau da kullun masu sauki da gajeren jimloli
hausa.for_a_5th_grade_student_brief_and_frie: ga dalibin aji 5, a takaice da kuma abokantaka
hausa.for_a_high_school_student_studying_pre: ga dalibin sakandare da ke karatun precalculus ko physics
hausa.click_explain_for_a_plain_language_bre: Danna "Bayyana" don bayanin harshe mai sauki na wannan ra'ayin ATC.
hausa.air_traffic_control_radar_display_use_: Nuni na radar na sarrafa zirga-zirgar sama. Yi amfani da Tab don canza jiragu, H don alkibla, R don hanyar tashi, C don ba da izinin kusantowa, Space don dakatarwa, I don takaitaccen yanayi.
hausa.toggle_fullscreen_for_the_atc_radar: Canza cikakken allo don radar na ATC

igbo.solve_5_math_challenges_correctly: Dozie ihe ịma aka mgbakọ 5 nke ọma
igbo.land_a_heavy_or_super_aircraft: Wedata ụgbọ elu Heavy ma ọ bụ Super
igbo.guide_aircraft_safely_solve_rate_probl: Duzie ụgbọ elu n'enweghị nsogbu. Dozie nsogbu ọnụego. Mụta mgbakọ njem ikuku.
igbo.light_traffic_generous_spacing_good_fo: Okporo ụzọ dị fẹẹ, oghere sara mbara — ọ dị mma maka ndị njikwa ọhụrụ.
igbo.manageable_load_focus_on_technique_wit: Ibu enwere ike ijikwa — lekwasị anya na usoro na-enweghị nrụgide oge.
igbo.realistic_airport_sequencing_required_: Ọdụ ụgbọ elu n'ezie — achọrọ usoro, esemokwu nwere ike ime.
igbo.high_load_expect_missed_approaches_fue: Ibu dị elu — tụ anya ọbịbịa efu, nrụgide mmanụ.
igbo.saturated_staffing_runway_capacity_exc: Ejupụta — ikike ndị ọrụ/ụzọ ọsọ agafeela.
igbo.move_five_operational_sliders_predict_: Kpụgharịa slider ọrụ ise. Buru amụma otu nke ọ bụla si emekọrịta tupu ịmalite oge. Enweghị akara, enweghị ngosipụta — gị onwe gị na-enyocha nghọta gị.
igbo.your_hypothesis_what_combo_do_you_expe: Echiche gị (kedu ngwakọta ị na-atụ anya na ọ ga-ebu ụzọ kwatuo ọrụ?)
igbo.e_g_low_separation_high_spawn_rate_com: dịka, nkewa dị ala + ọnụego ọpụpụ dị elu na-agbakọ tupu ifufe adịrị mkpa...
igbo.i_m_stuck_show_open_questions: 🤔 Arapụrụ m — gosi ajụjụ mepere emepe
igbo.which_two_sliders_are_most_coupled_do_: Kedu slider abụọ jikọtara nke ọma — ị na-atụ anya ibu mgbakwunye ka ọ bụ mmụba?
igbo.where_on_each_axis_does_the_trainable_: Olee ebe na axis ọ bụla mpaghara "enwere ike ịzụ" na-akwụsị na "nrụgide" na-amalite?
igbo.if_wind_goes_to_30kt_what_minimum_sepa: Ọ bụrụ na ifufe ruru 30kt, kedu nkewa kacha nta na-eme ka ibu na-adịgide?
igbo.could_a_faster_decision_timeout_compen: Enwere ike oge mkpebi ngwa ngwa kwụọ ụgwọ maka nkewa dị warara, ka ọ na-eme ka ihe ka njọ?
igbo.i_can_explain_in_my_own_words_why_this: Enwere m ike ịkọwa —n'okwu nke m— ihe mere ngwakọta slider a ji enye ibu a.
igbo.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Ngwa nyocha — enweghị akara, enweghị ngosipụta, enweghị ịtụfu azịza. Wuo echiche nke gị.
igbo.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: site na iji okwu mfe nke ụbọchị niile na ahịrịokwu dị mkpụmkpụ
igbo.for_a_5th_grade_student_brief_and_frie: maka nwa akwụkwọ klas 5, n'obi mgbubere na enyi
igbo.for_a_high_school_student_studying_pre: maka nwa akwụkwọ sekọndrị na-amụ precalculus ma ọ bụ physics
igbo.click_explain_for_a_plain_language_bre: Pịa "Kọwaa" maka nkọwa asụsụ dị mfe nke echiche ATC a.
igbo.air_traffic_control_radar_display_use_: Ngosi radar njikwa okporo ụzọ ikuku. Jiri Tab gbanwee ụgbọ elu, H maka isi, R maka ụzọ ọsọ, C inye ikike ịbịaru nso, Space ikwụsịtụ, I maka nchịkọta ọnọdụ.
igbo.toggle_fullscreen_for_the_atc_radar: Gbanwee ihuenyo zuru ezu maka radar ATC

yoruba.land_your_first_aircraft: Gbe ọkọ ofurufu akọkọ rẹ kalẹ
yoruba.land_10_aircraft_in_one_session: Gbe ọkọ ofurufu 10 kalẹ ni igba kan
yoruba.land_25_aircraft_in_one_session: Gbe ọkọ ofurufu 25 kalẹ ni igba kan
yoruba.solve_5_math_challenges_correctly: Yanju awọn ipenija mathimatiki 5 ni deede
yoruba.land_10_aircraft_with_zero_conflicts: Gbe ọkọ ofurufu 10+ kalẹ laisi ija
yoruba.land_a_heavy_or_super_aircraft: Gbe ọkọ ofurufu Heavy tabi Super kalẹ
yoruba.guide_aircraft_safely_solve_rate_probl: Dari awọn ọkọ ofurufu lailewu. Yanju awọn iṣoro oṣuwọn. Mọ mathimatiki ọkọ ofurufu daradara.
yoruba.light_traffic_generous_spacing_good_fo: Ijabọ fẹẹrẹ, aaye gbooro — o dara fun awọn oluṣakoso titun.
yoruba.manageable_load_focus_on_technique_wit: Ẹru ti a le ṣakoso — dojukọ ọna laisi titẹ akoko.
yoruba.realistic_airport_sequencing_required_: Papa ọkọ ofurufu gidi — a nilo itẹlera, ija ṣee ṣe.
yoruba.high_load_expect_missed_approaches_fue: Ẹru giga — reti awọn isunmọ ti o padanu, titẹ epo.
yoruba.saturated_staffing_runway_capacity_exc: Kun — agbara oṣiṣẹ/oju-ọna ofurufu ti kọja.
yoruba.move_five_operational_sliders_predict_: Gbe awọn ifaworanhan iṣẹ marun. Sọtẹlẹ bi ọkọọkan ṣe n ṣe ibaraẹnisọrọ ki o to bẹrẹ igba kan. Ko si Dimegilio, ko si ifihan — iwọ funrarẹ ni o ṣe ayẹwo oye rẹ.
yoruba.your_hypothesis_what_combo_do_you_expe: Idawọle rẹ (apapọ wo ni o reti pe yoo kọkọ wo awọn iṣẹ lulẹ?)
yoruba.e_g_low_separation_high_spawn_rate_com: f.a., iyapa kekere + oṣuwọn ifarahan giga n kojọpọ ki afẹfẹ to ṣe pataki...
yoruba.i_m_stuck_show_open_questions: 🤔 Mo di — fihan awọn ibeere ṣiṣi
yoruba.open_questions_no_answer_key: Awọn ibeere ṣiṣi (ko si bọtini idahun)
yoruba.which_two_sliders_are_most_coupled_do_: Awọn ifaworanhan meji wo ni o ni asopọ julọ — ṣe o sọtẹlẹ ẹru afikun tabi isodipupo?
yoruba.where_on_each_axis_does_the_trainable_: Nibo ni axis kọọkan ni agbegbe "ikẹkọ" ti pari ti "wahala" si bẹrẹ?
yoruba.if_wind_goes_to_30kt_what_minimum_sepa: Ti afẹfẹ ba de 30kt, iyapa kekere wo ni o jẹ ki ẹru duro ṣinṣin?
yoruba.could_a_faster_decision_timeout_compen: Ṣe akoko ipinnu yiyara le sanpada fun iyapa to dín, tabi o jẹ ki awọn nkan buru si?
yoruba.i_can_explain_in_my_own_words_why_this: Mo le ṣalaye —ninu awọn ọrọ mi— idi ti apapọ ifaworanhan yii fi fun ẹru yii.
yoruba.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Ẹrọ iwadii — ko si Dimegilio, ko si ifihan, ko si idasonu idahun. Kọ ẹkọ tirẹ.
yoruba.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: lilo awọn ọrọ ojoojumọ rọrun ati awọn gbolohun kukuru
yoruba.for_a_5th_grade_student_brief_and_frie: fun ọmọ ile-iwe Kilasi 5, ni ṣoki ati ọrẹ
yoruba.for_a_high_school_student_studying_pre: fun ọmọ ile-iwe giga ti n kọ precalculus tabi physics
yoruba.click_explain_for_a_plain_language_bre: Tẹ "Ṣalaye" fun alaye ede ti o rọrun ti imọran ATC yii.
yoruba.air_traffic_control_radar_display_use_: Ifihan radar iṣakoso ijabọ afẹfẹ. Lo Tab lati yi awọn ọkọ ofurufu pada, H fun itọsọna, R fun oju-ọna ofurufu, C lati gba isunmọ laaye, Space lati daduro, I fun akopọ ipo.
yoruba.toggle_fullscreen_for_the_atc_radar: Yi iboju kikun pada fun radar ATC
